cleavage agent: digested using filter-aided sample preparation with sequencing grade modified porcine trypsin
collision energy: precursor mass-dependent normalized collision energy between 28.0 and 31.0
fragmentation method: Following HCD activation, MS/MS data were acquired
instrument: mass spectrometric analysis on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
ionization type: Eluted peptides were ionized by electrospray (2.15 kV)
labeling: venom was not extracted from scorpions prior to harvesting, thus our samples represent a resting venom gland.
